name: LAKELAND INDUSTRIES INC
summary: Lakeland Industries, Inc. (doing business as Lakeland Fire + Safety) is a global provider of safety products protecting workers, first responders, and communities. Products include firefighter protective apparel and accessories, high-end chemical protective suits, limited use/disposable protective clothing, durable woven garments, high performance FR/AR apparel, and high visibility clothing. The company operates ten manufacturing facilities in eight countries across five continents, serving chemical, clean room, energy, fire service, manufacturing, and utility markets worldwide.
